top.title: Jeremy Bowen: Trump is waging war based on instinct and it isn't working
top.summary: One month into the conflict in Iran, Trump's gut-instinct approach is not proving effective, writes the BBC's international editor.

top.title: Iranian attacks across Gulf continue as major industrial sites hit
top.summary: A number of people are said to have been injured after attacks on aluminium sites in the UAE and Bahrain.

top.title: Three Lebanese journalists killed in Israeli strike, say broadcasters
top.summary: The Israeli military confirms it killed Ali Shoeib from the Hezbollah-affiliated Al Manar TV.

top.title: PS5 price hiked by £90 due to global 'pressures'
top.summary: The changes will see the recommended retail price of the PS5 rise from £479.99 to £569.99 in the UK.

top.title: Lloyds bank reveals IT glitch affected almost half a million customers
top.summary: In a letter to the Treasury Select Committee, Lloyds apologised and said some compensation had been paid.

top.title: Just Eat and Autotrader among firms investigated in fake reviews probe
top.summary: The UK's competition watchdog says it is looking at five firms in its investigation into misleading online reviews.

title.#text: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale is a great time to get a fancy, AI-powered bird feeder
Apple’s long, bitter App Store antitrust war
